name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a money transfer service offering domestic money sending/receiving and financial services through agent locations nationwide, including Ace Cash Express franchises.
description_long:
MoneyGram is a global money transfer company that operates through a network of agent locations across the United States, including partnerships with check-cashing retailers like Ace Cash Express. The company has established itself as a convenient option for consumers needing to send and receive money domestically and internationally. MoneyGram's primary value proposition centers on accessibility and convenience—customers can conduct transactions either online or in person at thousands of agent locations.

The company offers money transfer services as its core offering, allowing customers to send money nationwide and receive funds at participating locations. Transactions can be initiated online for pickup at physical locations or conducted entirely in person. MoneyGram operates through a franchise model with agent partners, meaning the actual storefront experience depends on the host location (in this case, Ace Cash Express). This dual-channel approach—online initiation with in-person pickup—reflects modern consumer expectations for financial service flexibility.

MoneyGram's primary distinction is its extensive physical location network combined with online accessibility. Unlike purely digital money transfer apps, MoneyGram maintains brick-and-mortar presence through established retail partnerships, making it accessible to underbanked consumers without smartphone reliance or bank accounts. The integration with check-cashing retailers creates a natural fit for consumers already using those services.

For consumers needing straightforward domestic money transfers, MoneyGram provides a widely available option with established brand recognition. However, the service is transaction-focused rather than comprehensive financial services, and costs (likely fees per transaction) are not detailed on the provided website content. The actual service experience and pricing depend heavily on the specific agent location's policies and the host retailer's standards.
pros: Nationwide network of convenient physical locations for in-person transactions
Dual-channel access: online initiation with in-person pickup reduces friction
Established brand with long operating history and consumer recognition
Partnership with check-cashing retailers (Ace Cash Express) provides familiar service environments
Same-location convenience—money transfer available where customers already conduct financial business
No bank account required for receiving funds at agent locations
Serves underbanked populations without digital payment infrastructure
cons: Transaction fees not disclosed on website—actual cost to consumers unclear
Service quality and customer experience dependent on individual agent location standards
Primarily transaction-based service with limited account features or relationship banking
Website provides minimal detail about sending speeds, limits, or service terms
Requires visit to physical location for in-person pickup (not pure digital convenience)
best_for: Consumers without bank accounts needing domestic money transfers
Underbanked populations preferring in-person financial transactions
Users seeking immediate cash pickup at convenient retail locations
Those already using check-cashing services wanting consolidated financial access
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need domestic money transfers and prefer in-person transaction options. The main caveat is that actual service experience, fees, and terms depend heavily on the individual agent location, and the website provides insufficient detail on pricing, transfer speeds, or service limitations.
services: Domestic money transfer within the United States
In-person transaction services at retail agent locations
Same-location pickup convenience at Ace Cash Express franchises

places_enrichment.adr_format_address: 301 E 8th Ave, Homestead, PA 15120-1517, USA
